title: dichanthelium inflatum
intro: Dichanthelium inflatum, also known as prairie bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Native to the prairies of North America, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dichanthelium inflatum include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
